//: Shipped defaults. Prefer editing a copy at ~/.config/prompt-improver/settings.json or .prompt-improver/settings.json (see settings.example.json). Keys starting with // are comments only. Tables (aliases, chains, commands) live in config/runtime-defaults.json — override any key here or in your copy.
//backend: auto | claude | grok | gemini | codex | cline | opencode | kimi | kiro — Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND
//model: null = per-backend defaults below. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL. Per-prompt model: wins.
//default_models: Generator model per CLI when model is null. null = leave CLI default.
//max_tokens: Soft cap passed through where backends support it (best-effort). Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_MAX_TOKENS
//enable_research: When false, generator omits/minimizes <research> blocks. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_ENABLE_RESEARCH
//enable_thinking: When false, generator omits <approach> blocks unless safety-critical. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_ENABLE_THINKING
//headless_only: When true, host should not rewrite prompts in-session when headless fails. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_HEADLESS_ONLY
//allow_web_search: When false, improved prompts must not instruct web search. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_ALLOW_WEB_SEARCH
//allow_code_execution_in_generation: When false, generator must not run gather-context.sh or shell. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_ALLOW_CODE_EXECUTION
//skip_validate: When true, skip validate-prompt.sh after headless generation. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_SKIP_VALIDATE
//backend_invocation: scripts = use scripts/backends/*.sh; commands = use backend_commands templates; auto = templates when you override backend_commands. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_BACKEND_INVOCATION
//fallback_strategy: manual = host bounce on limit exhaustion; error = hard fail
//preferred_backends: Order to try OTHER generators after primary hits limits — not the default pick
//custom_command: Any CLI: prompt on stdin → improved text on stdout. Bypasses built-in backends. Env: PROMPT_IMPROVER_CUSTOM_COMMAND
notes:
Fully customisable runtime tables: model_aliases, model_fallback_chains, model_backend_patterns, backend_commands, backend_model_flags, supported_backends, limit_detection, host_env_markers, parent_process_patterns, cascade_scan_order — see config/runtime-defaults.json; override any in your settings.json.

Model resolution: 1) model:/--model 2) PROMPT_IMPROVER_MODEL 3) default_models[backend] 4) CLI default.
Custom CLIs: custom_command (docs/CUSTOM-BACKENDS.md).
